speaker: MATT
raw_text: Initiative has now kicked in; I need everyone to roll initiative. (laughs)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Crunch.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The ground gives out from under them, they both go, (screams) and fall into a pit here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: See, aren't you glad that wasn't me?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Good job.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Couldn't have gone with the will o' the wisp.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A pit?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They would have floated right above it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This whole section here has now crumpled below. The dryads, however, have to make a save.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh my god.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One of them saves.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: But that wasn't us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't us!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That wasn't you guys. Like right there? Okay!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wasn't me! It's all I care about!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: This is the most Douglas Adams beginning of a fight ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One dryad dies a horrible screaming death. (screams) And the other one you hear is breathing heavily from the inside right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Keyleth is standing at the edge of the forest going--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: At which point, a bunch of the orcs turn around. I need both of you guys to-- let's see, because they're making active perception. What was your stealth check, Sam?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 15, but it doesn't matter. I'm walking forward.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (chuckles) Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to cast the Resilient Sphere on myself. And I'm going to roll into camp. Hamster-style.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Wait, can I go with you a little bit?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I do a thing with him?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If he says don't, then--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Then probably don't.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: No, let him do his thing. It's marble madness, everybody.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to start singing to get their attention. (sings 'Tro-lo-lo')

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Just avoid the pit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. All 60 feet, you avoid the pit, you roll around, all the orcs look over. "Huh? Stupid gnome!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Very stupid.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hello. Osysa sent us.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It mounts itself there, turns so it's facing both you and the rest of you as you all approach. "You, you seek power, glory, retribution. I know your quarry, and I know your goal. She has told me. I can show you. But all great knowledge should not be given. You must be proven. It must be earned. It must be EARNED." And as his voice roars, the room echoes and you can see wind begin to whip all around you. Glancing over your shoulder, you guys can see now the empty pit in the center of the hall behind you is now whipping into a whirlwind and what appears to be a small centralized cyclone that's now rising up, meeting the ceiling, staying stationary in place, arcing there. The braziers flame up even brighter now, the flames, you can feel the heat even from your distance at this point. You can see now the sphinx is baring its gleaming white teeth there at the top. "What. Is. My. Name?"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Fuck.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: 12, yeah. The fear still strikes in your heart. All right. Vax, that's the end of your turn. All right. I need everybody in here to go ahead and reroll initiative as the time flux in the room all of a sudden flickers and time seems to shift and move. Everyone reroll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's nothing on it, nothing to do. I'm going to throw three daggers through the web. Is that the one-- so Percy's over there? I'm going to throw three daggers through the web over there.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, go for it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, what was it? Sorry, it was?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, the second two hit, so go ahead and roll damage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Ten and eight.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ten and eight. All right. You throw two and it cuts a few threads and the path of it falls limp but the web stays up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: And I can't move any closer to the sphinx at this point, right, because of the fear?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Correct.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So I'm stuck here, am I?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you can't move any closer to it right now. But you can make a saving throw at the end of your turn to try--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I will do that. I'd also like to take one step to the right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: One step to the right? All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This way, yeah. And no, I rolled an eight for wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you're still in the fear effect. All right. By the way, Grog, go ahead and make a saving throw to resist the effect so it's gone, even though you--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, at disadvantage?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Which saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, you're still under the effect. And Scanlan, actually, roll it again.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, but I'm raging.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Right, you resist, I mean, it doesn't affect you but it still persists.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Got you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: If you stopped raging then the fear would kick in.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Is this a saving throw?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This is wisdom.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: And do I still get advantage or no, because the first time it's cast.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You would, I'd say, sure.
